violations.text: Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. PIC brought to be cleaned and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/08/2025

Working containers of liquid ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2025
